summary: UI Redesign and SRD API testing complete. Both features fully verified: 1) UI redesign with parallax backgrounds, glass morphism tabs, gradient buttons on GM Screen and Player Dashboard. 2) SRD database API with 39 spells, 6 classes, 4 races, 8 feats - all endpoints working correctly with filtering and individual retrieval.

frontend_tests.ui-redesign.spec.ts: 6 passed (NEW - Parallax, glass morphism tabs, gradient buttons)

seed_data_creation: No test data created. Tests use existing campaign and test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Redesign and SRD API testing complete. Key test data: TEST_CAMPAIGN_ID = '1e6a6d0d-ad88-4b8a-9cc5-a1672119343c'. GM Screen tabs have data-testid='tab-{id}' for combat, maps, dice, monsters, creatures, names, tables, loot, inventory, party, notes. Player Dashboard tabs have data-testid='tab-characters' and 'tab-notes'. SRD API endpoints: /api/srd/spells, /api/srd/classes, /api/srd/races, /api/srd/feats, /api/srd/class-features/{class}/{level}.

srd_spells_api.description: All spell endpoints working: GET all spells (39 total), filter by level/school/class, GET individual spell. Fireball, Magic Missile, cantrips all retrievable.

srd_classes_api.description: All class endpoints working: GET all classes (6 total: Barbarian, Bard, Cleric, Fighter, Rogue, Wizard), GET individual class with features.

srd_class_features_api.description: Class features by level working: GET /api/srd/class-features/{class}/{level} returns features available at that level.

srd_races_api.description: Races endpoint working: GET all races (4 total: Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling) with ability bonuses and traits.

srd_feats_api.description: Feats endpoint working: GET all feats (8 total including Alert, Great Weapon Master, Sharpshooter, War Caster).

gm_screen_ui_redesign.description: GM Screen has parallax background with grid pattern, glass morphism tabs (11 tabs visible and clickable), gradient buttons.

player_dashboard_ui_redesign.description: Player Dashboard has parallax background, glass morphism tabs (Characters, Notes), gradient buttons (Create New Character, Join Campaign).
